channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3285] Data on MDT
item.description: Change MDS and client stacks to handle both meta and data requests. This makes MDS to be able to store data of file along with metadata.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Landed for 2.11

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/30058/
Subject: LU-3285 mdt: remove assertion on mdt_pack_size2body()
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 7cd12b5e4867b7eb36b691f14443324195573ddf

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/30057/
Subject: LU-3285 mdt: get lu_object_attr for existent object
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 7dd122f16f28f8a546f454468c028b014381d2c6

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/30016/
Subject: LU-3285 tests: disable kernel flusher in discard tests
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 099db8c2699e1f42a90240b400722ea727b7cf18
Mike, thanks for attaching the design doc here. If you get a chance, it would be great to also upload this to wiki.lustre.org and link it into the "Layout Enhancement" and "PFL" Pages.

Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 7983be9af572433f24ceb4e3533b77866ec0e4e8

Mike Pershin (mike.pershin@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/29796
Subject: LU-3285 mdc: Data-on-MDT bugfixes
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: dom
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 7e6fe918719f43641fe215dbdba6af01b231b78e

With racer fixes added I see a bunch of this:

[15138.561905] LustreError: 3485:0:(osc_cache.c:3053:osc_cache_writeback_range()) extent ffff880028efff18@{[0 -> 4/255], [1|0|-|cache|wiY|ffff880065776de0], [45056|5|+|-|ffff88004494cd00|256|          (null)]} 
[15138.563935] LustreError: 3485:0:(osc_cache.c:3053:osc_cache_writeback_range()) ### extent: ffff880028efff18 ns: lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff88006d3d1800 lock: ffff88004494cd00/0xaf26e9486c3a188b lrc: 4/0,0 mode: PW/PW res: [0x200000401:0x2501:0x0].0x0 bits 0x40/0x0 rrc: 2 type: IBT flags: 0x409400010000 nid: local remote: 0xaf26e9486c3a18a7 expref: -99 pid: 15046 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
[15138.566816] LustreError: 3485:0:(osc_cache.c:1236:osc_extent_tree_dump0()) Dump object ffff880065776de0 extents at osc_cache_writeback_range:3053, mppr: 256.
[15138.567961] LustreError: 3485:0:(osc_cache.c:1241:osc_extent_tree_dump0()) extent ffff880028efff18@{[0 -> 4/255], [1|0|-|cache|wiY|ffff880065776de0], [45056|5|+|-|ffff88004494cd00|256|          (null)]} in tree 1.
[15138.570091] LustreError: 3485:0:(osc_cache.c:1241:osc_extent_tree_dump0()) ### extent: ffff880028efff18 ns: lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff88006d3d1800 lock: ffff88004494cd00/0xaf26e9486c3a188b lrc: 4/0,0 mode: PW/PW res: [0x200000401:0x2501:0x0].0x0 bits 0x40/0x0 rrc: 2 type: IBT flags: 0x409400010000 nid: local remote: 0xaf26e9486c3a18a7 expref: -99 pid: 15046 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
[15138.573017] LustreError: 3485:0:(osc_cache.c:3053:osc_cache_writeback_range()) ASSERTION( ext->oe_start >= start && ext->oe_max_end <= end ) failed: 
[15138.574266] LustreError: 3485:0:(osc_cache.c:3053:osc_cache_writeback_range()) LBUG
[15138.575330] Pid: 3485, comm: ldlm_bl_01
[15138.575873] 
Call Trace:

[15138.636106]  [<ffffffff810a2df0>] ? kthread_create_on_node+0x140/0x140

[15138.636871]  [<ffffffff810a2df0>] ? kthread_create_on_node+0x140/0x140
Fixed in the latest patch. This assertion was taken back from past accidentally

I plugged the whoel dom branch (but without dom-specific tests as far as I can see) into my testrig and I am seeing a bunch of failures like below.
This is happening on current master-next that has some other patches too, so we cannot rule out other interference I guess. But still wanted to post it here.

[18585.634896] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 184c: Concurrent write and layout swap ================================================ 07:36:36 (1508585796)
[18623.293063] LustreError: 22846:0:(osc_object.c:208:osc_object_ast_clear()) ASSERTION( lock->l_granted_mode == lock->l_req_mode ) failed: 
[18623.295240] LustreError: 22846:0:(osc_object.c:208:osc_object_ast_clear()) LBUG
[18623.300072] Pid: 22846, comm: lfs
[18623.300853] 
Call Trace:
[18623.302374]  [<ffffffffa02237fe>] libcfs_call_trace+0x4e/0x60 [libcfs]

Mike Pershin (mike.pershin@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/23009
Subject: LU-3285 mds: optimize locking for Data-on-MDT files
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 1105626cd883327f31aea057ada40916d9bbcdec

Mike Pershin (mike.pershin@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/22996
Subject: LU-3285 osc: prepare OSC code to be used from MDC
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 98e7be6e8de4d0609c89c56059cdcefba89d2734

This feature needs to have an OBD_CONNECT flag to indicate that the client and server support it. One option is to use the OBD_CONNECT_REQPORTAL feature on the MDS connection, since that was used in the past to add a separate IO portal on the OSS.
